programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade heads to the Australian outback to try and catch the rare and fearsome freshwater sawfish, a shadowy predator said to be 18 feet long and known to attack boats.

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Sepik River in New Guinea to investigate a creature suspected of taking the lives of at least two fishermen.

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade searches for a two-hundred year old legend.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade fights through tropical storms and dangerous jungles to search for a Fijian killer that has been part of the local folklore for years, but there may be more than one.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is lured to the shores of the Mekong River in Cambodia to search for a monstrous fish that has mauled, blinded, killed and most recently sliced clean through a young man's testicle.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates rumors of a twenty-foot lake monster that attacks people; with snakes, freshwater sharks and giant sturgeon unlikely possibilities, the answer as to what it is drives Jeremy crazy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade returns to the Okavango Delta to re-investigate a predatory carnivore that may have mauled over 100 victims of a capsized boat; to discover the truth, Jeremy offers himself up as live bait.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: A recent fatal incident in the Alaskan wilderness sends Jeremy on a quest for possible suspects that culminates in a showdown with an unexpected, bizarre water beast.

programme.title: Too Cute!
programme.desc: Follow puppies in the first months of these Pugs, Mini-Australian Shepherds and Rottweillers' lives as they will be adventure-filled, including a lesson in duck-herding.

programme.title: Too Cute!
programme.desc: Heartwarming romps featuring hairless Sphynxes, inquisitive Burmese cats, and tiny Ragdolls who buddy up to German Shepherds.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: Terri attends the exam of Charlie the tiger to determine if his tumors were successfully treated; Bindi and the Small Mammal Team help develop a vaccine for Eden the Tasmanian devil; Robert discovers the true genders of the zoo's shingleback lizards.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul calls in an expert when Allan and Curtis insist Mississippi alligators are stronger than their counterparts from Florida; Sara feels neglected by Jimmy.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul and Jimmy get off to a rocky start in Mississippi; the boys work in sweltering heat to finish a gator pit before the wrestling shows can begin.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Alan and Shannon hoped for a cat they could cuddle, but instead they got Barnabas - a hissing, flesh-ripping cat. The only thing that calms him down is opera music, but if Jackson can't help them, Alan is done with Barnabas.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Jordan's beloved cat Chloe bullies Julie's cat Ketone making these newlywed's new life together a nightmare; Latham and Adrian spent a small fortune renovating their beachfront home in Laguna, but their cat Ducati is destroying their hard work.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: Sugar cares for blind pit bull, ravaged by other dogs; Pittsburgh couple falls in love with Baker Red; Earl cares for pup when homeless owner goes to rehab.

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: A New Hampshire family comes a long way to find a new dog; call leads to a heartbreaking find; Earl finally sees a spine specialist.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: Forrest combs the Florida Everglades for a predator rumored to exist for years, the Black Panther; it might be a case of mistaken identity, but while scouring the landscape, discoveries suggest that it might be more than a rumor.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: Madagascar's Pachylemurs were red, furry giants, nearly the size of great apes; recently discovered remains disprove that they went extinct 1,000 years ago; Forrest tries to prove the giant species still lives.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: Forrest teams up with a specialist in Newfoundland in search of a predator that was declared extinct in 1930; the duo meets with a hunter that shot what is believed to be a wolf and uncovers evidence that suggests the species could be alive.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: Forrest travels to the Faroe Islands to look for any trace of the great auk; his passionate search for a large flightless seabird takes him through some of the most scenic and rugged terrain he's ever seen.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: Forrest tracks clues and eyewitness accounts suggesting that the Formosan clouded leopard is still alive after being declared extinct; he treks deep into the jungles of Taiwan where a run-in with a predator might just solve a mystery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: Hiking in the Montana mountains, trail engineer Todd Orr is attacked twice by grizzly bear protecting her cubs; during a vacation in the Bahamas, Tiffany Johnson is snorkeling when she finds herself face-to-face with a tiger shark.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: Micki Glenn is attacked by a shark during a dive trip; hours from the nearest medical facility, she has to rely on her husband and friends to save her life; a couple is attacked by a giraffe while on safari.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: Nicole Moore's vacation in Cancun, Mexico, gets cut short when a shark attacks her close to shore; in Tennessee, a timber rattlesnake bites firefighter Kyle Watson while he hikes in the woods with his family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Allena Hansen works on her ranch in the California desert with her two rescue dogs when a black bear attacks; in Cancun, Mexico, Jonathan Schoeneman goes spearfishing with his best friend when he comes face to face with a crocodile.

programme.desc: The boys deal with more nuisance alligators; Tre embarks on a mission to locate a legendary creature that supposedly haunts the bayous of Mississippi.

programme.desc: Problems with nuisance alligators keep the boys busy; a boy encounters a danger in his pool; Ashley's PR scheme involves Scott dressing in a gator costume.
